visual_enhancers.border_radius: Use generous rounding for a friendly vibe. Cards should be rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl. Buttons should be rounded-full (pill shape). Tags rounded-full.

shadows.light: shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] for cards, hover state: shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.08)]
shadows.dark: No large shadows. Use subtle 1px border-white/10 and inner drop-shadow for depth.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Used for bottom navigation bar and sticky headers: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 (light) or bg-[#121B2A]/80 (dark). MUST have a top/bottom 1px subtle border.
visual_enhancers.icons: Use lucide-react with strokeWidth={2.5} for a slightly thicker, playful, 'bubbly' appearance.

layouts.viewport: Mobile-first (~390-430px wide container limit for web view). Wrap the main app inside a max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen relative structure to simulate an Android app on desktop.
layouts.spacing: Generous. Use p-4 to p-6 inside cards. Use gap-4 or gap-6 between layout sections.
layouts.bottom_nav: Fixed at bottom. 5 items: Dashboard, Kalender, Add (Center FAB, large, brand primary), Analisis, Profile.
layouts.dashboard_grid: Bento style. Top: Large Total Balance card. Below it: 2 columns for Income (Teal) and Expense (Coral).
layouts.timeline: Grouped by date. A sticky date header (e.g., '22 Jumat, Agu 2025'), followed by a list of transaction items (icon, title, time, amount).

components.cards: Flat design with slight shadows in light mode. Do not use pure transparent backgrounds. Always explicit surface color.
components.budget_progress: Progress bars with colored fills. Turn #EF4444 (Coral Red) when exceeded. Display a 'Melebihi Anggaran' pill if > 100%.
components.interactive_pie_chart: Use Recharts. Make segments clickable to show details. Center of donut chart shows total expenses.
components.transaction_form: Includes an image upload zone (thumbnail preview using the provided receipt image URL or user upload), amount input, category selector.
components.tabs: Used for 'Pelacak Utang' (Untuk Dibayar / Untuk Diterima). Pill-shaped segmented controls.
components.calendar_grid: Monthly view. Tiny green (income) and red (expense) dots under the dates.

motion.transitions: Use framer-motion for smooth page routing. Slide in from right/bottom.
motion.micro_interactions: Tap scale: whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }} on all buttons and clickable cards.
motion.charts: Animate pie chart segments on load. Animate progress bars growing from 0.

image_urls.description: 3D Blue wallet representing the KantongKu Mascot. Use on Splash, Onboarding, and Auth pages.
3D Gold coins stack. Use as decorative asset in 'KantongKu Pro' pricing page.
Receipt paper. Use as the thumbnail preview in the Transaction Form.
QR code payment mock. Use in the simulated checkout modal for KantongKu Pro.
Smiling Asian user profile picture. Use in the header and Profile page.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building 'KantongKu', an Indonesian Smart Money Management App.
IMPLEMENT A STRICT MOBILE-FIRST VIEWPORT: The app should look like a mobile app (max width ~430px, centered horizontally with a subtle border on desktop screens).
Enforce Dark Mode toggling properly using Tailwind's 'dark:' variant. The dark mode toggle should be in the Dashboard Header and Profile section.
Use Bricolage Grotesque for headings to give a playful, modern feel, and Plus Jakarta Sans for UI text.
Create a simulated Bottom Navigation Bar with 5 items. The middle item should be a floating action button (FAB) for adding transactions.
All text must be in Indonesian as requested (e.g., 'Catat Keuangan', 'Pelacak Utang', 'Untuk Dibayar', 'Untuk Diterima', 'Kalender Keuangan', 'Analisis', 'Akun dan Dompet').
For the KantongKu Pro pricing page, use the Gold Coins image and implement a mock QRIS payment overlay.
Make sure the Debt Tracker (Pelacak Utang) uses Tabs to switch between Payables and Receivables.
All interactive elements MUST have 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='bottom-nav-home').
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Do not apply universal transition (transition: all). Use specific transitions.
Do not center align the app container in App.css (no .App { text-align: center; }).
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
NEVER use placeholder domains (via.placeholder.com). Use the exact URLs provided in the media object.
